BDP-002G.title: Add differential reading engine contract
BDP-002G.summary: Records the platform as a differential reading engine: a governed method for tracing assemblage, flow, cut, capture, desire, affect, qualitative difference, and line of flight.
BDP-002G.operator_rule: Do not map everything. Find the cut. Follow the flow. Name the capture. Preserve the difference.
BDP-002G.next_recommended_action: BDP-002G.1 — Wire the optional Differential Engine panel into The Dark Precursor after operator review, or test the template on one reviewed example.

BDP-002H.description: Split Dark Precursor inline CSS into frontend/styles/dark_precursor.css and ensure page config runs before differential panel render.

bdp_003e9_archive_writer_implementation_.next_step: BDP-003E.10 — Define local reviewed concept card archive implementation boundary and safety gates before writing code.

bdp_003e10_archive_implementation_bounda.title: Define local reviewed concept card archive implementation boundary and safety gates before writing code
bdp_003e10_archive_implementation_bounda.decision: The local reviewed concept card archive writer may proceed only into a later explicitly approved implementation phase guarded by safety gates. Implementation is not approved by BDP-003E.10.
bdp_003e10_archive_implementation_bounda.boundary_type: implementation boundary and safety gates before writing code
safety_gates: writer must accept only locally reviewed concept card payloads that match the BDP-003E.5 schema candidate
writer must reject unreviewed generated drafts and malformed payloads
writer must write only to a later approved local archive path
writer must be idempotent and preserve reviewed metadata without evidence promotion
writer must not create citations, concept relations, interpretations, or Buchanan-specific claims
writer must remain separate from frontend controls, backend services, adapter endpoints, and database migrations unless later approved
review_inputs: BDP-003E.3 exported cinematic concept card sample cases
BDP-003E.5 local reviewed archive schema candidate
BDP-003E.8 archive writer contract boundary review
bdp_003e10_archive_implementation_bounda.next_step: BDP-003E.11 — Implement local reviewed concept card archive writer behind safety gates, if approved.

bdp_003e11_local_reviewed_concept_card_a.title: Implement local reviewed concept card archive writer behind safety gates
bdp_003e11_local_reviewed_concept_card_a.decision: The local reviewed concept card archive writer is implemented as a local/manual utility behind safety gates. No frontend, backend, adapter, database, evidence, citation, relation, interpretation, or Buchanan-claim integration is approved by BDP-003E.11.
safety_gates_enforced: accept only locally reviewed payloads with the approved archive schema marker
reject governance flags that would promote evidence or create scholarship claims
write only to an explicit operator-supplied local archive root
sanitize archive record identifiers before deriving file names
preserve idempotency and refuse conflicting existing archive files
run verifier writes only inside a temporary directory
review_inputs: BDP-003E.5 local reviewed archive schema candidate
BDP-003E.8 archive writer contract boundary review
BDP-003E.10 implementation boundary and safety gates
bdp_003e11_local_reviewed_concept_card_a.next_step: BDP-003E.12 — Review local reviewed concept card archive writer output against sample payloads before UI integration.
